emails.subject: Re: Wharton Finance Conference sponsorship information
emails.body: I'd be interested to see who else is sponsoring the conference and who the other panelists would be. Since it is a first year conference, the success of it is highly dependent on the people who are pulling it together. Since the deadline on the sponsorship form is Sept. 8, they should be able to give us an indication of other participants. Do you want me to call Suresh to find out he's been emailing me every other day about how interested he is in working for EBS anyway. The timing of it is good the week after everyone comes for Super Saturday. I'd also be interested in what Tom says. I'd only do a Gold sponsorship I don't think we need or want to be on more than 1 panel either the corporate finance or sales and trading. Michele Nezi Marvin Manager Enron Broadband Services (713)853-6848 Jeffrey A Shankman@ECT 10/05/00 10:55 AM

emails.subject: RE: Wharton Finance Conference sponsorship information
emails.body: What do we need to do to be involved. Kristin, can you call Tom Piazze and ask him what he thinks
